Time_Period: The time period during which the metrics were recorded. The time period is represented in quarters.
Platform: The platform on which the conversion funnel metrics were recorded. This can be either mobile or desktop.
Age_Group: The age range of the customers whose behaviors were recorded for the metrics. This can be in the form of '18-35', '36-50', etc.
Bounce_Rate: The percentage of users who leave the website after viewing only one page.
Average_Session_Duration: The average time users spend on the website per session. This is measured in minutes.
Cart_Abandonment_Rate: The percentage of users who add items to their cart but do not complete the checkout process.
